WITH MEMBER [Time].[Time].[1997 Q1 plus July] AS
 'Aggregate({[Time].[1997].[Q1], [Time].[1997].[Q3].[7]})', solve_order=1
SELECT {[Measures].[Unit Sales], [Measures].[Customer Count]} ON COLUMNS,
  {[Time].[1997].[Q1],
   [Time].[1997].[Q2],
   [Time].[1997].[Q3].[7],
   [Time].[1997 Q1 plus July]} ON ROWS
FROM Sales
WHERE ([Store].[USA].[CA])

sqlExecutions.sql: select "time_by_day"."quarter" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997) and UPPER("time_by_day"."quarter") = UPPER('Q1') group by "time_by_day"."quarter", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."quarter" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."quarter" ASC

select "time_by_day"."quarter" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997) and UPPER("time_by_day"."quarter") = UPPER('Q3') group by "time_by_day"."quarter", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."quarter" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."quarter" ASC

select "time_by_day"."month_of_year" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."quarter" = 'Q3') and "time_by_day"."month_of_year" = 7 group by "time_by_day"."month_of_year", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."month_of_year" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."month_of_year" ASC

select "time_by_day"."quarter" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997) and UPPER("time_by_day"."quarter") = UPPER('Q2') group by "time_by_day"."quarter", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."quarter" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."quarter" ASC

select "time_by_day"."quarter" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997) group by "time_by_day"."quarter", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."quarter" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."quarter" ASC

select "time_by_day"."month_of_year" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1" from "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."quarter" = 'Q3') group by "time_by_day"."month_of_year", "time_by_day"."the_year" order by CASE WHEN "time_by_day"."month_of_year" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, "time_by_day"."month_of_year" ASC

select "store"."store_state" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1", "time_by_day"."month_of_year" as "c2", sum("sales_fact_1997"."unit_sales") as "m0", count(distinct "sales_fact_1997"."customer_id") as "m1" from "sales_fact_1997" as "sales_fact_1997", "store" as "store", "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where "store"."store_state" = 'CA' and "time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."month_of_year" = 7 and "sales_fact_1997"."store_id" = "store"."store_id" and "sales_fact_1997"."time_id" = "time_by_day"."time_id" group by "store"."store_state", "time_by_day"."the_year", "time_by_day"."month_of_year"

select "store"."store_state" as "c0", count(distinct "sales_fact_1997"."customer_id") as "m0" from "sales_fact_1997" as "sales_fact_1997", "store" as "store", "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where "store"."store_state" = 'CA' and (("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."quarter" = 'Q1') or ("time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."month_of_year" = 7)) and "sales_fact_1997"."store_id" = "store"."store_id" and "sales_fact_1997"."time_id" = "time_by_day"."time_id" group by "store"."store_state"

select "store"."store_state" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1", "time_by_day"."quarter" as "c2", sum("sales_fact_1997"."unit_sales") as "m0", count(distinct "sales_fact_1997"."customer_id") as "m1" from "sales_fact_1997" as "sales_fact_1997", "store" as "store", "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where "store"."store_state" = 'CA' and "time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "time_by_day"."quarter" in ('Q1', 'Q2') and "sales_fact_1997"."store_id" = "store"."store_id" and "sales_fact_1997"."time_id" = "time_by_day"."time_id" group by "store"."store_state", "time_by_day"."the_year", "time_by_day"."quarter"
